subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Due to the multitude of occupations and the disturbance of health, until now I have not written you a letter, but always [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست قدیم از کثرت مشاغل و اختلال صحت تا بحال بشما نامه ننوشتم ولی همیشه در
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
